ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Unix timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the financial instrument */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price during the trading session */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price during the trading session */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the financial instrument */,
  "adjusted_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price to account for dividends and splits */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Total volume of transactions */,
  "change" REAL /* Percentage change in price from the previous day */,
  "change_abs" REAL /* Absolute change in price from the previous day */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument to which the data belongs */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, derivative) */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the instrument belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Specific industry within the sector */,
  "market_cap" TEXT /* Market capitalization of the instrument */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the instrument is traded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traders" (
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trader */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the trader */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trader */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the trader (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the trader */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the trader belongs */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the trader joined the firm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_logs" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being traded */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Unix timestamp when the trade was executed */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission fee for the trade */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., executed, pending, canceled) */,
  "broker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the broker who facilitated the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_logs_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis report */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument being analyzed */,
  "analyst_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analyst who generated the report */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis report */,
  "price_trend" TEXT /* Description of price trend (e.g., bullish, bearish) */,
  "volume_trend" TEXT /* Description of volume trend (e.g., increasing, decreasing) */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommendation based on analysis (e.g., buy, sell, hold) */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the analysis report */,
  "technical_indicators" TEXT /* Key technical indicators used in the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_analysis_analyst_id FOREIGN KEY ("analyst_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange (e.g., NASDAQ, NYSE) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the exchange */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the exchange */,
  "closing_hours" TEXT /* Closing hours of the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., analyst, trader, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object detailing specific permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_settings" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert setting */,
  "trader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trader setting the alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price increase, price decrease) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Status of the alert (active or inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Unix timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Unix timestamp when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_trader_id FOREIGN KEY ("trader_id") REFERENCES traders ("trader_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_settings_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)
